purpose: Bind one Codex synchronization candidate to a clean current main base, one audited Git tree, one local commit and at most one ordinary push attempt.
formula: eligible = main AND clean AND (HEAD = tracking_main = remote_main); push_attempts <= 1; pushed = validation_pass AND source_unchanged AND audited_tree_stable AND remote_main_still_equals_parent
failure_semantics: Any false or unknown term stops the pipeline. A created local commit and append-only raw evidence are preserved; history is never rewritten.
calibration_boundary: This deterministic gate does not schedule runs, coalesce changes, fetch remote history, resolve divergence, or claim the S07-P3-T3 restore rehearsal.
